repo.description: Official implementation for "RIFLEx: A Free Lunch for Length Extrapolation in Video Diffusion Transformers" (ICML 2025) , UltraViCo (ICLR 2026) and UltraImage

terms.context_snippet: This repository provides the official implementation of [RIFLEx](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.15894) **(ICML 2025)**, [UltraViCo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.20123) **(ICLR 2026)** and [UltraImage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.04504) , which achieve diffusion-transformer extrapolatio…
